zh.Neustadt bei Coburg, Sachsen-Coburg-Goth: 賀爾左圖姆 薩辛-可包格 武德 格塔斯塔特 貝 可包格
zh.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Melzer是Jacob Melzer的女兒，於1646年3月9日出生。她於1672年8月23日與Johann Tresenreuter Kantor在賀爾左圖姆 薩辛-可包格 武德 格塔斯塔特 貝 可包格結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1723年享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Melzer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Berthold, Erhardt, Frieda, Helmut, Klaus, Manfred, Walburga.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Meltzer   ‘maltster’.

variants.name: Meltzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Yaakov, Ari, Benzion, Gilat, Hillel, Isadore, Mayer, Oded, Rimma.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a maltster, a brewer who used malt, from German Meltzer (an agent derivative of Middle High German malz ‘malt, germinated barley’), Yiddish meltser ‘maltster’.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Melzer was born on 9 March 1646 as the daughter of Jacob Melzer. She married Johann Tresenreuter Kantor on 23 August 1672, in Neustadt bei Coburg, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1723, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Melzer est née le 9 mars 1646, fille de Jacob Melzer. Elle a épousé Johann Tresenreuter Kantor le 23 août 1672, à Neustadt bei Coburg, Herzogtum Sachsen-Coburg und Gotha. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1723, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Melzerは1646年3月9日にJacob Melzerの娘として生まれた。1672年8月23日にハーゾグトゥム サチセン-コブルグ ウンド ゴサネウスタト ベイ コブルグでJohann Tresenreuter Kantorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1723年に77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Melzer(은)는 1646년 3월 9일 Jacob Melzer의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1672년 8월 23일 허초그투 작센-컵르그 운드 가스아 니우스타드트 브이 컵르그에서 Johann Tresenreuter Kantor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1723년 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Neustadt bei Coburg, Sachsen-Coburg-Goth: неустадт би кобург, хирзогтум сачсен-кобург унд гота
ru.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Melzer родилась 9 марта 1646 г. Её отца звали Jacob Melzer. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Tresenreuter Kantor 23 августа 1672 г. в местности неустадт би кобург, хирзогтум сачсен-кобург унд гота. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1723 г. в возрасте 77 лет.
